title: ctenanthe luschnathiana
intro: Ctenanthe luschnathiana, also known as the Upright Calathea or Never Never Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenanthe luschnathiana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
